name: Hettrich Sascha
text: It is a pleasure to us to recommend you as architect in relation to the design of our swimming pool and the adjacent garden area at our house in Tuscany, Italy. Not only the creative part, but also the technical recommendations on the pool technique as well as the selected materials and colors was an exiting element of your advice. The pool was built into an existing environment of a more than 300 years old rustico and the requirement to meet the old style with a new swimming pool was a not easy question to be solved. However you have done a great job and the design of the garden area surrounding the pool was the outcome - from our point of view - of your experience as well as your talent as designer and architect and we have seldom met somebody as yourself. Thank you very much for your effort.
